release_notes.title: Power Features — Undo, Search, Duplicates, Workers & Optimistic Sync
release_notes.summary: 5 high-impact upgrades adapted from Linear, Gmail, Stripe: undo any delete, instant search on Revenue/Expense, non-blocking CSV import via Web Worker, automatic duplicate detection on import, and live sync status indicators.

changes.text: Undo deletes: deleting a transaction now shows a 6-second 'Undo' toast (Linear/Gmail pattern) — no more confirm dialog, no more accidental data loss. The transaction is fully restored if you click Undo.
Instant inline search on Revenue and Expense tabs — search descriptions, categories, amounts, dates, and months all at once with 150ms debounce. Empty-state hint appears when no matches found.
Pagination Prev/Next controls now visible on Revenue and Expense tables — combined with search you can scan 100k+ rows without ever leaving the page.

Non-blocking CSV import via Web Worker: files over 500KB now parse on a background thread, so the UI stays responsive (typing, charts, scrolling) during big imports. Progress bar shows live parse progress.

Automatic duplicate detection on CSV import: rows matching existing transactions on date + amount + description + type are flagged. One-click choice to skip duplicates (recommended) or import everything.
Optimistic UI for Google Drive sync: top-bar status now shows 'Syncing to Google Drive…' then '✓ Synced' on every edit, removing the 'did it sync?' anxiety. Failures show 'Sync failed — will retry'.
CSP updated to allow blob: workers (required for the non-blocking CSV parsing) while keeping all other lock-down protections intact.

release_notes.title: CX Polish — Help, Install Prompt, Plain-Language Backup & Empty States
release_notes.summary: 7 usability improvements: smart CSV import with date/number format selectors, actionable empty states with sample data, in-app help drawer, smart PWA install banner, plain-English backup labels, and canonical URL.

changes.text: CSV import: date format selector (Auto-detect / US / European / ISO) and number format selector (Auto-detect / US 1,234.56 / EU 1.234,56) — no more silent parse failures on European bank exports
Empty state on Dashboard, Revenue, and Expense tabs: three CTA buttons (Add Transaction, Import CSV, Try Sample Data) guide first-time users instead of a blank screen
Sample Data mode: one click loads 6 months of realistic demo transactions so you can explore the app before entering real data
In-app Help drawer: ? button in the top bar opens a slide-in panel with Quick Start steps and 7 common-question FAQs with a link to the full User Guide
Smart PWA install banner: shows 'Install this app' only after you've added 3+ transactions (engaged users accept at ~25% vs ~3% on first load)
Backup tab labels renamed from developer jargon ('Layer 1/2/3') to plain English: Quick Save, Save to My Computer, Sync to Google Drive
Canonical URL meta tag added; manifest start_url updated to / so the app installs to the root URL

release_notes.title: License Key Sign-In + Blank-Page Hardening
release_notes.summary: Sign in to the app with just your email + license key — no Google account required. Plus defensive code so a corrupted cached session can never blank the screen.

changes.text: Alternative sign-in: use your email + license key (from your purchase receipt). No Google account needed to access the dashboard. Google sign-in remains the default; license-key entry is linked below the Google button.

Blank-page root cause fixed: an old or malformed cached session (missing user.plan or user.name) would throw an uncaught error in unlockApp() after the auth gate was hidden, leaving the screen blank. unlockApp() now handles every field defensively and restores the auth gate if anything goes wrong.
Boot flow wrapped in try/catch — if bootApp() itself crashes for any reason, the cached session is cleared and the auth gate is brought back so the user has a recoverable state.

Google Sheets sync is unchanged and remains optional — it's still accessed from Backup tab and uses Google OAuth separately from app sign-in. License-key users get full Sheets sync if they choose to enable it.

release_notes.title: Security, Performance & Offline Hardening
release_notes.summary: Audit-driven release: 19 security and reliability fixes, single self-contained file that works online AND offline, table pagination for 100k+ rows, and accessibility improvements.

changes.text: Single self-contained HTML — Chart.js + XLSX.js inlined, no CDN dependency. Works fully offline from a downloaded file.
XSS hardening — all user-controlled fields (descriptions, categories, CSV imports, toast messages) now properly HTML-escaped
Content-Security-Policy meta tag added — blocks injected scripts even if escaping is bypassed
CSV export now prefixes formula-injection cells (=, +, -, @) with a leading quote to prevent Excel formula execution
Revenue and Expense tables now paginate at 50 rows per page — instant render even with 100,000+ transactions
